text: Prevents the game from overriding custom zoom levels and camera settings during the enemy turn.
Controls when the close-up cinematic shots (kill-cams) trigger.
Prevents the tactical camera from zooming in and following attacker/target during combat actions.
Allows you to move and rotate the camera freely during combat
column3: even when the game tries to lock it.

text: Prevents the game from forcing a specific zoom level during certain actions.
Caches and restores camera position and zoom when switching between Tactical and Overview modes.
Prevents the camera from automatically jumping to enemies when they move or act during their turn.
Prevents the camera from jumping while you are aiming
Scales the strength of the background blur (Depth of Field) during cinematic shots. Lower values make it softer.
